reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of inductive bias and recombination, but does not open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links novelty pools, selection heuristics, and inherited human evaluative filters into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Test by varying filters and pools, then measuring whether outputs exceed inherited explanatory styles.
explanation: Apparent model novelty may mask inherited human judgment shaping selection, interpretation, and explanatory style.
